zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Holland于1350年出生在英国諾圖波藍德时，他的父亲Richard de Holland I25岁，母亲Ameria de Kenyon13岁。他和Rose Skeffington至少有3个女儿。他去世于1405年在英国享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Holland was born in 1350, in Northumberland, England, his father, Richard de Holland I, was 25 and his mother, Ameria de Kenyon, was 13. He had at least 3 daughters with Rose Skeffington. He died in 1405, in England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Holland est né en 1350, à Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Holland I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ameria de Kenyon, avait 13 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 filles avec Rose Skeffington. Il est décédé en 1405, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Holland 1350 in Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Holland I 25 und seine Mutter Ameria de Kenyon 13. Er hatte mit Rose Skeffington mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1405 im Alter von 55 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Holland è nato il nel 1350 nel Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Richard de Holland I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Ameria de Kenyon, aveva 13 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figlie con Rose Skeffington. Morì nel 1405, nel England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Hollandが1350年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Richard de Holland Iは25歳，母Ameria de Kenyonは13歳であった。彼はRose Skeffingtonとの間に少なくとも3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1405年にイギリスで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Holland(이)가 1350년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Holland I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Ameria de Kenyon(은)는 13세였다. 그는 Rose Skeffington(와)과 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1405년 영국에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Manor Denton, Prestwich, Lancashire, Eng: Prestwich, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Holland nasceu em 1350, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Holland I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ameria de Kenyon, tinha 13 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhas com Rose Skeffington. Ele faleceu em 1405, em Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Holland родился в 1350 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Holland I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ameria de Kenyon, 13. У него было по крайней мере 3 дочери от Rose Skeffington. Он умер в 1405 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Holland nació en 1350, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Holland I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ameria de Kenyon, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijas con Rose Skeffington. Murió en 1405, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
